banners_dates_check.name: banners_dates_check
banners_dates_check.value: "banners"."endsAt" is null or "banners"."startsAt" is null or "banners"."endsAt" > "banners"."startsAt"

challenges_dates_check.name: challenges_dates_check
challenges_dates_check.value: "challenges"."endsAt" is null or "challenges"."startsAt" is null or "challenges"."endsAt" > "challenges"."startsAt"

competition_questions_source_fk_check.name: competition_questions_source_fk_check
competition_questions_source_fk_check.value: ("competitionQuestions"."source" = 'math' and "competitionQuestions"."mathQuestionId" is not null and "competitionQuestions"."wordId" is null) or ("competitionQuestions"."source" in ('en','ar') and "competitionQuestions"."wordId" is not null and "competitionQuestions"."mathQuestionId" is null)

competitions_dates_check.name: competitions_dates_check
competitions_dates_check.value: "competitions"."endsAt" is null or "competitions"."startsAt" is null or "competitions"."endsAt" > "competitions"."startsAt"
